results.title: Stop Missing Leads — AI Calls Them Instantly
results.content: I mean, this is like next-level like Oh, I I mean, I could just think of all the crazy things that you can do with this thing, but I think it's absolutely amazing. I want to thank you guys. I think like I said, you guys are like some of the sweetest, nicest people ever. I honestly pretty huge fan of this software because it's solved a lot of reasons for a lot of people that are running sales and like what is happening to the traffic currently right now. And I think with the current age of AI and everything that's happening, I think people are going to get very distracted. And if you can immediately grab their attention by a waving hand like you mentioned or a pop-up that says, "Hey, want to chat right now?" Or, you know, "Hey, here's a phone. I'd love to talk to you." Or it starts ringing [...] and as as an example, AI understand the user is reading the pricing and it will proactively outreach to the visitor via say auto chat connect or inviting them on a call with the like auto call connect with something like, "Hey there, did you know that our basic plan starts from just $97? Would you like me to arrange a demo for you really, you know?" So, it will proactively reach with all kinds of different messages with all the context contextual messages and engage visitors instantly as soon as the users are on the website. And that is how it helps generate about 30 to 50 or even some cases 70% more conversions. You know, to be clear, you are on your phone, you are in the Knock Knock app on your computer, and you are watching as you're scrolling, this is happening live. Now, if I wanted [...] of that visitor. If it is a hot lead, AI tries to engage with that visitor instantly while they're on your website. And you can video call your customers. AI engages and once the user is engaged, it basically invites them on a call or on a message and you can talk to your visitors just like you're speaking to someone on the first time. So, it is quite unique, innovative, and the businesses were using it, they're seeing literally about 50% more conversions with the help of Knock Knock app. Yeah, that's pretty insane though. And I can speak from experience myself. Like we've already been selling it to some of our clients who are sales people, who are running mortgages, real estate, and it's incredible that the second somebody lands on the site that conversation can immediately begin. But
